---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature, source, or change.
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem or opportunity

What gap does this fill? What can someone do once this exists that they can't do today?

## Proposed change

A short description of the proposed feature or behaviour.

## Out of scope

Anything explicitly not part of this proposal.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...
- [ ] tests cover the new behaviour
- [ ] `PROJECT_PROGRESS.md` updated
